cast.name: 斯捷潘·别洛佐罗夫 Stepan Belozyorov
马克·埃德尔斯坦 Mark Eydelshteyn
蒂娜·斯托吉尔科维奇 Tina Stojilkovic

introduction: Dasha and Sasha are a happy newlywed. A honeymoon and a parachute jump over the foothills of Mount Elbrus are supposed to be the beginning of their new life. But fate intervenes. The pilot turns out to be Artyom-Dasha's ex, a man she didn't even want to remember. When the plane crashes, the three are forced to jump without training. The lines get tangled. They miraculously survive-but find themselves suspended over a mountain abyss amid raging forest fires. Dasha finds herself between two men, each of whom is tied to her life. One is the present. The other is an unhealed past.
